title: Briful 23.5cm Tall Handmade Wooden Flower Vase, 9.3" Large Wood Vase for Flowers Natural Ash Wood Tall Vases for Floral Arrangement Home Decoration
features: Bring a natural warmth and simple sophistication to your space with the Ash Wood Vase. Available in two styles, this artisan-made vase highlights the organic graining of the ash wood in sculptural silhouettes, and can stand alone on a bookcase or table or can serve as a foundation to your favorite faux or dried bouquet.

This wooden vase features a large rounded heavy body with a circular neck and big opening. The included plastic liner easily holds water or dirt, thus makes it possible to place your favorite fresh or faux florals in it and then set it on the countertop for a look that will work for every season!

This decorative accent measures in with a height of 9.3 inches will give a sense of both beauty and warm. Showcase this natural beauty with an edge as a table centerpiece or a great holder for any flower arrangements that would perfectly fit your interior at any space.

The beauty of natural wood makes the Wooden Vase a stunning addition to a table or shelf, with an intentionally unfinished matte texture that leaves the raw grain on full display. The unfinished color makes it easy to pair with a variety of styles such as farmhouse or boho.

Due to the nature of the material and the hand-carved design, no two items will be exactly alike, some variation in the finish is to be expected, and cracks may appear over time in the wood. Avoid exposure to water.
